summary: Comprehensive testing of JT-Zero robotics runtime Phase 7 (pybind11) + Phase 10 (Performance) completed successfully. Native C++ runtime fully operational, all APIs functional, dashboard integrated with performance monitoring.

ui_bugs.issue: Chart width/height error: 'width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'
ui_bugs.impact: Console warnings only, charts functionality not broken, same issue from iterations 1 & 2

passed_tests: GET /api/health returns mode='native', native=true, build_info with compiler/cpp_standard/platform details
GET /api/state returns live C++ sensor data (imu, baro, gps, rangefinder, optical_flow all valid with proper structure)
GET /api/camera returns C++ camera data (frame_count > 0, vo_features_detected > 0, fps_actual, vo_tracking_quality)
GET /api/mavlink returns state=CONNECTED, messages_sent > 0, messages_received > 0, vision data counters
POST /api/command with arm changes flight_mode to ARMED - verified end-to-end
POST /api/command with disarm changes to IDLE - verified end-to-end
POST /api/command with takeoff transitions to HOVER state correctly
Dashboard loads with all panels visible (drone telemetry, sensors, camera, mavlink, performance, events, commands)
Dashboard header shows C++ Native badge prominently
Performance panel shows runtime mode badge 'C++ NATIVE', CPU progress bars (9 found), memory stats, thread statistics
Command buttons work end-to-end (ARM, DISARM, TAKEOFF, LAND all clickable and functional)
WebSocket connection active with LINK status and heartbeat indicator
Real-time data streaming confirmed - frame counts updating every 2 seconds, event log active
All 7 threads running in native runtime (T0_Supervisor, T1_Sensors, T2_Events, T3_Reflex, T4_Rules, T5_MAVLink, T6_Camera)
pybind11 C++ bindings working correctly - native module accessible and functional
Performance metrics within acceptable ranges: CPU < 4%, Memory < 1MB, Zero dropped events

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All native C++ runtime endpoints working perfectly, performance metrics excellent
success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All panels functional, command integration working, minor chart rendering warnings
success_percentage.integration: 100% - Commands, WebSocket, real-time updates, pybind11 bindings all working
success_percentage.websocket: 100% - Real-time streaming at 10Hz with performance data included working perfectly
success_percentage.native_runtime: 100% - C++ runtime via pybind11 fully operational with excellent performance metrics
success_percentage.performance_monitoring: 100% - Performance endpoint functional, dashboard panel integrated, metrics within target ranges
